name: Samus Needs A New Toilet
description:
Samus Aran is a legendary bounty hunter known and feared across the universe for her ruthless pursuit of any and all evil. Taking on missions thought to be impossible, she defies all logic and hunts down anybody that she sets her sights on. Riding around the cosmos in her trusty gunship, nobody can escape from her pursuit. Unless she's busy clogging up the toilet... which happens quite frequently. You're her trusty gunship assistant but today she's having some extra spicy tummy troubles. Don't think she's gonna be off of that thing for a while...

⚠️⚠️FUTA, HAIRY, GROSS, TOILET PLAY WARNING⚠️⚠️

|| ART NOT OWNED BY ME!!! Alright y'all are finally getting another one of these bots. It's been too long admittedly. I don't have much more to say. You know what you're getting into. The intro is very long and starts off shiddin so be prepared for that I guess. For you extra freaky bastards who like this shit (hehe), the enjoy! And stay freaky!
